intent: Write a 3-source 'first bike commuter gear' brief including storefront accessories and safety science. (1) One Stop Market shopping site — browse the sports-outdoors and clothing-shoes-jewelry categories and collect at least 4 cycling accessories (helmet, light, lock, reflective gear). Record name, price, rating, review count. (2) Reddit — browse /f/LifeProTips AND /f/science for posts on helmet effectiveness, lock-theft trade-offs, or city-commute tips. Collect at least 3 posts with title, score, comment count. (3) Wikipedia — open 'Bicycle helmet' and 'Bicycle safety' articles and extract 3-4 facts. The report must: (a) present 4 storefront picks with stats, (b) justify each with a Wikipedia fact, (c) adjust priorities using community experience, (d) close with a $120 must-have kit plus a behavioral rule. Cite every claim.
